field.comment: Character encoding of the body. Value can be: plain, unicode or auto
field.name: encoding

field.comment: The message body. Max. Character Length: 608 for plain / 264 for unicode
field.name: body

field.comment: Your given route to send the message on. Can be a valid route ID supplied by Spryng or the default business route
field.name: route

field.comment: The sender of the message. Can be alphanumeric string (max. 11 characters) or phonenumber (max. 14 digits)
field.name: originator

field.comment: List of recipient numbers MSISDNs. Max. 50 per API-call
field.name: recipients

field.comment: Time when the message should be sent, Atom/RFC3339 formatted. (default: now)
field.name: scheduled_at
